purpose: Separate Rafael/RLL authorial parameters from external-literature parameters and nuisance parameters before information-criterion comparisons.
claim_policy: Parameter origin is provenance metadata only; it does not establish model preference.

parameters.name: H0
parameters.notes: Use as a free parameter or external prior consistently across all compared models.

parameters.name: Om
parameters.notes: Matter density entering E(z), BAO, CMB compressed priors, growth and S8.

parameters.name: Ok
parameters.notes: Default fair-comparison route is flat unless curvature is explicitly released for every model.

parameters.name: Ob_h2
parameters.notes: Needed when r_d is derived instead of fixed.

parameters.name: rd
parameters.notes: Must be fixed for all models or derived for all models; never mix policies inside one comparison.

parameters.name: w
parameters.notes: Required baseline before attributing improvements to RLL-specific dynamics.

parameters.name: w0
parameters.notes: CPL baseline must be fitted independently, not conflated with RLL.

parameters.name: wa
parameters.notes: CPL baseline must be fitted independently, not conflated with RLL.

parameters.name: Os0
parameters.notes: Authorial RLL amplitude; do not label as external literature parameter.

parameters.name: zt
parameters.notes: Transition redshift; requires prior bounds and sensitivity checks.

parameters.name: wt
parameters.notes: Transition width; must stay positive and be reported as a free parameter.

parameters.name: sigma8
parameters.notes: Needed for fσ8 and S8 diagnostics; not interchangeable with S8.

parameters.name: M_abs
parameters.notes: SN nuisance/calibration parameter, not an RLL physical parameter.

failsafe.rollback: This registry is metadata only; remove or revert this file without touching data/real/** if validation fails.
failsafe.claim_boundary: No superiority claim is allowed unless every fitted/free/nuisance parameter is counted consistently in k.
